BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
January 17, 2023
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,079 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 946 Short-term Indicators:
↑ 30D: 2.0% ↓ 30D: -39.4% Momentum: Neutral
↑ YTD: 4.3% ↓ YTD: -37.6% Sentiment: Neutral
↓ YOY: -44.3% ↓ YOY: -46.4% Fundamentals: Positive
Bi-Weekly Report
• Higher lows/higher highs could be on the cards for this year - As dry bulk activity resumes following the Christmas
holidays, traders are faced with the anticipated seasonal slowdown and thus falling spot freight rates across all asset
classes. The spot market inadvertently affects future expectations, although in the last week or so freight futures
prices have begun to show some much-needed optimism, pushing the curve into a contango and signaling increased
enthusiasm about China's import prospects once the Northern hemisphere exits winter. As we have stated before,

• Higher lows/higher highs could be on the cards for this year - As dry bulk activity resumes following the Christmas
